privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating four artifacts at specific paths in /home/ga: (1) original_ui.png - a screenshot of the OpenICE interface with Vital Signs application, (2) process_accessibility.py - a Python script using Pillow to convert images to grayscale and calculate luminance, (3) accessibility_proof_gray.png - the grayscale output image, and (4) luminance_report.txt - a text file containing the mean luminance value. All file paths are consistently used across task setup, artifact detection, and verification stages.
